svg.aria-label: beyond-the-code — MuhammadAbdullah.cs. An immutable C# record: Role, Full-Stack Software Engineer. Education, First-Class BSc (Hons). Philosophy, if it's structured, it can be automated. Off the clock: happiest at the wheel of an HGV, one day a pilot's licence, husband and father first. DailyRoutine loops forever: coffee and code, learn something new, build and automate, share what I learn.
